entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC

[xule.ruleDebug] Processing: DQC.US.0204.10707 - 11:29:41.776002 - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\TRUG_instance_2024_2025.xml

[xule.ruleDebug] D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\TRUG_instance_2024_2025.xml - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\TRUG_instance_2024_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0204.10707] The concept us-gaap:CapitalizedComputerSoftwareGross with a value of 313,889 has been used with the axis PropertyPlantAndEquipmentByTypeAxis and the member trugolf.com:SoftwareAndComputerEquipmentMember. The concept CapitalizedComputerSoftwareGross should not be disaggregated using this axis as the software in the type of PPE. Replace the concept with the concept PropertyPLantAndEquipmentGross.
Concept : us-gaap:CapitalizedComputerSoftwareGross Value : 313,889 Period : 2024-03-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:PropertyPlantAndEquipmentByTypeAxis=trugolf.com:SoftwareAndComputerEquipmentMember
